_README: Exchange holidays (full-day CLOSURES), keyed by the exchange codes in lib/sessions.js (SEHK/KRX/TWSE/TSE/EURONEXT/XETRA/LSE/US). Hand-maintained like calendar.json — top up each year. Dates are the exchange's LOCAL calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). marketState() returns 'holiday' on these so the Pre-Read labels the print '· holiday' instead of expecting a live quote. SAFE-DEGRADING: a MISSING holiday just falls back to normal hours (no worse than before); only a WRONG date mislabels a real trading day, so verify before adding. Half-day early closes are NOT modeled. Seeded 2026-07-15 for the remainder of 2026, verified against exchange/aggregator calendars; lunar-based dates (Chuseok, Mid-Autumn) especially warrant a re-check each year.
